story.heading: From weekend Sahyadri hikes to Himalayan expeditions
paragraphs: What started in 2016 as a handful of friends carpooling to Kalsubai every weekend has grown into one of India's most-loved trekking communities. We've since guided over 18,000 trekkers across 40+ routes.
We still run trips the same way we did on day one — small groups, honest briefings, and leaders who treat the mountains (and the people who live in them) with respect.

values.title: Curiosity-led
values.body: We design trips that reward wonder — lesser-known trails, local stories, and time to just look up.

values.title: Safety obsessed
values.body: Wilderness-first-aid-certified leaders, conservative weather calls, and the right gear on every climb.

values.title: Light on the land
values.body: Carry-back waste, plastic-free trails, and a portion of every booking funds mountain clean-ups.

values.title: Community-rooted
values.body: We hire, host and source locally so tourism actually reaches the villages we walk through.
